author: ShadyTidus
name: AnonMail
description: Anonymous feedback system with abuse prevention. Users select a recipient from a configurable role and submit anonymous feedback via modal. Features per-user cooldowns and a ban list for repeat abusers. Feedback is posted to dedicated threads.
install_msg:
AnonMail installed!

Setup:
1. `[p]anonmailset channel #feedback`
2. `[p]anonmailset recipientrole @Role`
3. `[p]anonmailset enable true`

Optional:
- `[p]anonmailset cooldown 60` - Set cooldown in minutes
- `[p]anonmailset senderrole @Role` - Restrict who can send
- `[p]anonmailset ban @user` - Ban abusers

Users use `[p]feedback` to submit.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs of banned users and temporarily tracks cooldowns in memory. Feedback content is anonymous.
